name: Mexican Wings
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds Large chicken wings, split or not, tips c
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine hot sauce, margarine, catsup, and spices in a bowl. Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring frequently.
2. Fry the wings at 365°F (185°C) until crispy, about 6-9 minutes depending on size and equipment used. Check under "ANCHOR BAR HOT WINGS" for proper handling procedure of the wings.
3. Drain the wings well.
4. Toss the cooked wings in the hot sauce mixture.
